Defines memory layout and constants for flash regions in the Pebble firmware, including sector sizes and addresses.

# Purpose
This C header file defines constants and macros related to the configuration and layout of a flash memory system. It specifies the sizes and address masks for sectors and subsectors, which are used to manage memory regions within the flash storage. The file outlines specific memory regions for different purposes, such as debug logs, shared storage for Bluetooth pairings, manufacturing information, firmware scratch space, and system resources. It also includes definitions for a test region within the flash memory, which overlaps with the filesystem region to allow for non-critical testing. The file ensures that the flash test space is within the expected range and defines the total size of the NOR flash memory.
